case_title: NIANTIC CORPORATION, A CALIF. CORPORATION vs. AMERICAN ARTS SOCIETY et al

docket_entries.description: RM 504 MARY MORGAN VISITING JUDGE, CLACY/CLERK DPADILLA/CSR CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL, STEVEN LITTMAN FOR PLAINTIFF NO APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT. FOLLOWING PRESENATION OF EVIDENCE ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY BY PLAINTIFF, COURT RENDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 582 MARKET ST. #808 AND 809, $3863.31 DAMAGES AND $723 ATTORNEYS FEES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN ARTS SOCIETY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 582 MARKET ST. #808 AND 809 $3,863.31 RENT, $723.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,586.31, LEASE FORFEITED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC CORPORATION, A CALIF. CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $23.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC CORPORATION, A CALIF. CORPORATION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN ARTS SOCIETY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC CORPORATION, A CALIF. CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN ARTS SOCIETY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN ARTS SOCIETY
GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN ARTS SOCIETY
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIANTIC CORPORATION, A CALIF. CORPORATION COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-07-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 504 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
